system.card_description: Configure device preferences and display options.
system.wan_guard_tooltip: Checks WAN interface profiles at boot and disables any that don't have an active data connection, preventing unnecessary CPU usage.

scheduled_operations.card_description: Set up automated system tasks on a schedule.
scheduled_operations.low_power_tooltip: Disables the modem radio during the scheduled window. Watchdog, email alerts, and network events are automatically suspended for the duration.
scheduled_operations.low_power_repeat_aria: Low power mode days of the week
scheduled_operations.low_power_toast_save_failed: Failed to save low power schedule
scheduled_operations.low_power_toast_update_failed: Failed to update low power schedule

ssh_password.page_description: Change the root password used for SSH and console access. This is independent from your QManager web login.
ssh_password.card_description: Change the root password used for SSH and console access. This is separate from the QManager web login and does not affect your current browser session.
ssh_password.strong_policy_hint: New password must be at least 5 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
ssh_password.weak_policy_hint: New password must be at least 5 characters.

bandwidth_monitor.card_description: Configure the live bandwidth monitoring service.
bandwidth_monitor.info_tooltip: Monitors real-time network throughput across multiple interfaces using a dedicated binary and WebSocket stream. Requires websocat package.
bandwidth_monitor.dependency_warning: websocat is not installed. Install with:

config_backup.page_description: Save an encrypted snapshot of your modem settings. Use it to recover after a factory reset or to clone configuration onto another modem — different models are supported, but incompatible sections will be skipped during restore.
config_backup.pending_reboot_description: A previous restore queued an IMEI change or profile activation that needs a modem reboot to take effect. Reboot now or use the Reboot Now button below when you are ready.
config_backup.dismiss_dialog_description: Any IMEI change or profile activation queued by the restore will not take effect until you reboot the modem. Dismiss only if you have already rebooted through another method.

create.card_description: Pick which sections to include and set a passphrase to encrypt the download.
create.profile_uncheck_hint: Uncheck overlapping items to include profiles
create.warning: Store this passphrase somewhere safe. If you lose it, this backup cannot be recovered — there is no reset option.
create.toast_failed: Couldn't create backup. Please try again.

restore.card_description: Upload a .qmbackup file to overwrite the settings it contains with the values saved in the backup.
restore.password_required_description: This backup is encrypted. Enter the passphrase used to create it.
restore.password_incorrect_description: Decryption failed. Check the passphrase and try again.
restore.model_warning_body: Backup was created on {{from}}, restoring onto {{to}}. Incompatible sections will be skipped.
restore.ready_sections_label: These sections will overwrite your current settings:
restore.reboot_dialog_description: Some restored settings (IMEI change and/or Custom SIM Profile activation) need a modem reboot to take effect. The QManager interface will be unavailable for about 30–60 seconds during the reboot.

password_dialog.title: Enter backup passphrase
password_dialog.description: This backup is encrypted. Enter the passphrase used when it was created.
password_dialog.label: Passphrase
password_dialog.error_incorrect: Incorrect passphrase. Check it and try again.
